subject: Physics
title: The Cosmic Pie Chart
description: A quick win: understand The Cosmic Pie Chart.

hook.text: Everything you can see—stars, planets, people—makes up just 5% of the universe. The rest is invisible.

buildup.text: Precise measurements of the cosmic microwave background reveal the universe's composition.

discovery.text: Dark energy is 68%. Dark matter is 27%. Ordinary matter—atoms, stars, planets—is only 5%.

twist.text: We understand the physics of just 5% of the universe. The other 95% remains deeply mysterious.

climax.text: Solving the dark matter and dark energy mysteries would be the biggest physics breakthrough since relativity.

punchline.text: 5% known. 95% mystery. The universe keeps its biggest secrets.

quiz.question: What percentage of the universe is ordinary visible matter?
